content.scenarioHint: 周末和同事或朋友闲聊时，自然地询问对方上周末做了什么
content.speakerText: What did you get up to this weekend?
expectedAnswers: I went to the beach with some friends—just relaxed and soaked up the sun.
Not much, honestly. I cleaned my apartment and watched that new series everyone’s talking about.
Tried a new coffee shop downtown and then played board games with my roommate.
Stayed in and recharged. Work was exhausting this week!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了对方周末的活动
语言准确性：语法和时态使用是否正确（如过去时）
表达自然度：是否使用了地道的口语表达（如 'got up to', 'chilled', 'recharged'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'weekend', 'activity', 或相关动词（如 go, watch, stay）

content.speakerText: How did you spend your weekend?
expectedAnswers: I relaxed at home—watched TV, ate junk food, and did nothing. Perfect!
I visited my parents and we cooked together. It was so nice to catch up.
Nothing special, but I finally started that book I’ve been meaning to read.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰描述了周末活动，回应了开放式问题
语言准确性：时态使用正确，句子结构完整，无重大语法错误
表达自然度：是否使用了地道口语表达（如 'did nothing', 'junk food', 'catch up'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少两个周末相关动词短语（如 watch TV, cook together, read a book）
